summary: Depth=378 km / unit-mismatch attack added to WIN-064 detail_evidence, plus a stronger discovery: the live status_history.json shows the OBSERVATION is live-fetched (not static) but measures focal depth of a recent deep quake — orthogonal to the angular shadow-zone prediction. pass:true is set unconditionally because obs and pred are never compared. tolerance_pct:null against the dome's own 'no exceptions' tolerance-band methodology makes the domain unfalsifiable by the dome's self-imposed criterion. Apply EXP-199.patches[0] (detail_evidence replacement).
